name: Anna Bukowski
subject: Donald Trump just emailed me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
His #1 goal: strengthening the GOP majority.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ac82/c1f7015/6dc1b58b/1141ce1b/2295386646/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180829PM_em&recurring=auto") Friend, Donald Trump sent this email yesterday to millions of conservative donors, declaring his number one political priority in 2018 is to strengthen the GOP Senate majority. **He is directly challenging them to donate and unseat strong progressives like Tina. This is just one day before Mike Pence comes to Minnesota to fundraise with big money donors.** We cannot take this for granted. He raised millions of dollars from these donors in 2016, and if we do not fight with everything we have and hit every goal, we could lose this race. **[That's why I'm asking: Will you rush a contribution of $10 before Tina's deadline at midnight on Friday? Every dollar helps us respond and stop Trump from turning this seat red:](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ac82/c1f7015/6dc1b58b/1141ce1b/2295386646/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180829PM_em&recurring=auto")** **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ac82/c1f7015/6dc1b58b/1141ce1b/2295386646/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180829PM_em&recurring=auto")** Keep fighting, Anna Bukowski
Digital Director \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Donald Trump**
Subject: Proving the media wrong - Again!
To: Anna Bukowski Friend, I am writing to _personally ask you to take action_ to help me achieve my top political goal: Electing more Republicans to the U.S. Senate this November. I believe that control of the U.S. Senate is one of the most important issues of our time. **Donate now to strengthen our Republican Majority in the Senate.** We have accomplished A LOT during my short time in office. We still have a long way to go in our fight to Make America Great Again. Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, and the rest of the liberal establishment have opposed my agenda EVERY step of the way. The fake news media doesn't believe Republicans will retain our majority in the Senate after this year's midterms. We proved them wrong in 2016. With your help, we can prove them wrong again and secure conservative victories in the 2018 midterms. **Donate****NOW****to unseat liberal obstructionists and strengthen our majority.** The left's refusal to work with us proves why it is so important to vote them out and elect MORE Republicans in the 2018 midterms. **Can I count on you to make a donation today?** | **[**Donate $500**]()**
**[**Donate $250**]()**
**[**Donate $100**]()**
**[**Donate $50**]()**
**[**Donate Any Amount**]()**
_**All gifts 4x Matched**_ Thank you for your incredible support, President Donald J. Trump **[**Make America Great Again**]()**
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: McCain and Me
body:
McCain and Me No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-y/) [McCain and Me](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-j/)Since word came out that John McCain had passed away over the weekend, there have been many tributes to this Arizona Senator, American war hero, and almost-President. Rather than repeat a lot of what you've probably seen or heard since then, I thought I'd touch on a number of interactions I've had with him over the years. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Democrat Candidates for Congress are Misleading the Public](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-d/)
Democrats running for congress across the country are doing everything they can to mislead the public on a number of key issues. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [V](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-u/)[ice President Pence Comes to Cincinnati](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-o/)
The Vice President of the United States was in town yesterday and I had the honor of introducing him at a panel discussion. I thought I'd give you a rundown of our day. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-b/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [What Does the Columbus Congressional Race Yesterday Mean? And Aftab Pureval Uses Your Tax Dollars as Hush Money.](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-p/)
Yesterday was a special election day here in Ohio, so I'm on the blog talking about the important 12th Congressional District and last night's results. I'm also discussing yet another shady thing my opponent, Aftab Pureval, has been up to and sharing my first ad! Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-x/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjtkydkt-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---

subject: the general election is NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It's official: This campaign is swinging into full gear. Arizona's primary election is behind us, and we have our far-right opponent.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fb3/1a8421e1/1a552edf4/48e576ce/3777872731/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

Team, It's official: This campaign is swinging into full gear. Arizona's primary election is behind us, we have our far-right opponent, **and the general election is NOW.** And August ends on Friday -- so that means Friday is our first fundraising deadline of the general election. We can't afford to fall short, but we have another **$4,451** to raise in _two days._ [**Quick, can you make a donation right here, right now, to re-elect Tom and keep AZ-01 blue?**](http://action.tomohalleran. I don't want to worry you, but when I say that it's all hands on deck from now until November 6, I really mean it. Tom has been standing up for Arizonans every day in Congress, and he has a strong record to share with voters in our district.

But he is THE MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the entire House, which means this campaign needs to be firing on all cylinders to win. **We 're going to run a robust voter outreach program, Tom is going to hear from voters all around the district, and we're going to go toe-to-toe with the far-right's Super PACs on TV.**

But we won't be able to do any of this if we don't have your grassroots support and if we don't meet our fundraising goals. [**Please, help us start out the general election by crushing our goal on Friday with a donation today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.29_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Ryan Mulcahy
Campaign Manager

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.29_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. subject: US Economic Growth in the 2nd Quarter Gets Revised Higher, Remains Strongest Since 2014
body:
| |

#
# _US Economic Growth in the 2nd Quarter Gets Revised Higher, Remains Strongest Since 2014_
“The US economy in the second quarter grew even faster than initially estimated, according to a Commerce Department report released Wednesday,” Akin Oyedele reports for _Business Insider_. “Gross domestic product, the value of every good and service produced domestically, rose at an annual rate of 4.2%, the Commerce Department said, its fastest growth since the third quarter of 2014 . . . The April-to-June period was the first full quarter with the tax cuts signed by President Donald Trump in effect,” Oyedele explains. [**Click here to read more.** ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0MjY0NDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI2NDQ0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5ODk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/business-insider-us-economic-growth-2nd-quarter-gets-revised-higher-remains-strongest-since-2014/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) “The vast majority of U.S. blue-collar workers say their lives are headed ‘in the right direction,’ according to the results of a poll released this week,” Katelyn Caralle reports in the **_[Washington Examiner](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0MjY0NDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI2NDQ0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5ODk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/washington-examiner-high-career-life-satisfaction-among-american-blue-collar-workers-poll/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr)._** “Eighty-five percent of these workers in America are optimistic regarding the direction of their lives, and 86 percent are satisfied with their jobs.” A majority also expressed optimism about the overall direction of the country, the survey showed. [**_The Associated Press_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0MjY0NDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI2NDQ0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5ODk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.apnews.com/1f1ddd8bb9ff474d8eeb9724db763e2b/Trump-marks-award-of-%2491-million-in-anti-drug-grants) reports that President Trump is awarding $91 million in grants to a record number of community anti-drug coalitions. “The White House says all 50 states will benefit from the grants from the White House Office of National Drug Control Policy that aim to ‘strengthen the infrastructure among local partners to create and sustain a reduction in local youth substance abuse.’” The [**_Investor’s Business Daily_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0MjY0NDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI2NDQ0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5ODk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.investors.com/politics/editorials/household-income-trump-economy/) Editorial Board writes that household income has soared to all-time highs under President Trump. “Median household income is up more than 4%, the economy is growing fast, optimism is at decades long highs . . . Over the course of President Obama's entire eight years in office, median household income climbed a mere 0.3%.” In [**_The Wall Street Journal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0MjY0NDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI2NDQ0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5ODk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/u-s-workers-report-highest-job-satisfaction-since-2005-1535544000), Lauren Weber reports that American workers have the highest job satisfaction since 2005. “Just more than half of U.S. workers—51%—said they were satisfied with their jobs in 2017, the highest level since 2005, according to a new report from The Conference Board,” she writes.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0MjY0NDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI2NDQ0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5ODk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0MjY0NDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI2NDQ0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5ODk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0MjY0NDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI2NDQ0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5ODk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

subject: Mel took a red pen to our opponent’s latest email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:

Rep. Walorski sent out a wildly misleading fundraising email yesterday -- so Mel took out a red pen and made a few edits.

Not only did Rep. Walorski mischaracterize Mel's beliefs and background -- but she also asked her donors to help her raise $50,000 by midnight tomorrow.

We're betting her corporate PAC backers will bail her out with a big check to meet her goal -- and that's where you come in, friends.

name: Kate Ramstad
subject: need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
**The FINAL end-of-month deadline before the Democratic primary election is TOMORROW!!!** Gina is committed to Rhode Island and its comeback, but she is still _$7,372 short_ of her August fundraising goal and won't be able to reach it without you.
**In the last four years, Governor Raimondo has brought real change to Rhode Island.** Schools, roads, and bridges are being fixed, and there are cranes in the sky. We have the nation's first offshore wind farm. We are teaching computer science in every public school. And we're ranked best in the nation for pre-K.
**We need your help to keep our momentum going through election day.[Can you please click here and contribute before the DEADLINE at midnight tomorrow??](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a01b/5e076a9e/541eb3e1/14425b4d/914402285/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180830")**
We will be grateful for anything you can do -- $7, $13, $27, $64, $100, $250, $500.
Rhode Island cannot afford to go backwards. **[Please chip in TODAY to help us hit our goal and secure our future.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a01b/5e076a9e/541eb3e1/14425b4d/914402285/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180830") Let's keep our comeback.**
Best,
Kate
Kate Ramstad
Finance Director

\-------
###### Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
###### Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940
###### This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
###### If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, visit [https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a01b/5e076a9e/541eb3e1/14425b4c/914402285/VEsF/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe").

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: What's on My Desk this Month
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501135961%2501August%2bE-Newsletter%250115512.11249668.4037691.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501135961%2501August%2bE-Newsletter%250115512.11249668.4037691.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **August 30, 2018** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### Saying Goodbye to an American Hero
This week, we lost a true American hero. Senator John McCain was a statesman, a veteran, and an individual of unstinting character who served the country he loved with passion, determination, and exuberance. The loss of Senator McCain will be felt deeply throughout the Senate, the country, and by people around the world who were given hope by his call for universal human rights and freedom. He could be both gracious and gruff, but he was always a person of great integrity and moral courage. While I disagreed with John McCain on a number of issues, I never doubted the sincerity of his convictions. He often said that what gave his life meaning was serving causes bigger than himself. He did that. He succeeded in living a life of purpose. He made a difference. I will miss John McCain.
---
### **Supporting Ellicott City **
In May, one of Maryland's historic treasures, Ellicott City, was hit with its second devastating flood in a two-year period. Yet, again, amid all the chaos and heartbreak, the community has come together to support each other and move forward. We have taken the first steps to help provide relief by securing a federal disaster declaration, and the Small Business Administration is working with shop owners to provide assistance. Still, the biggest challenge is to develop and implement a strategy to prevent future floods from having the same devastating impact. We know that climate change is generating more extreme weather events like those that hit Ellicott City, and I have proposed federal legislation to address that issue. Unfortunately, the Trump Administration is reversing some of the policies that are already in place to stop the overheating of our planet. We cannot, however, allow the lack of progress on climate change at the federal level to stop us from doing everything possible to protect the Ellicott City community. That is why, earlier this month, Senator Ben Cardin and I teamed up with Congressman Elijah Cummings to hold a Senate Environment and Public Works Committee field hearing in Ellicott City to listen to ideas about how to mitigate the damage from future storms. The hearing gave us a much clearer idea of the measures and the resources that will be necessary to confront that challenge. Now we must all come together at the local, state, and federal level to hammer out a comprehensive strategy and identify the resources to implement it. The Ellicott City community has inspired us all with its resilience and determination. I know I speak on behalf of all our fellow Marylanders when I say that Ellicott City is not alone. Let's all work together to get the job done.
### **Protecting Democracy**
We must protect the integrity of our democratic process. President Trump's national security team has admitted that the Russians interfered in the 2016 elections and they have predicted that, unless we take action, Putin will do so again in the 2018 midterm election. That's why I've introduced bipartisan legislation with Republican Senator Marco Rubio to deter Russia - or any other country - from doing just that. It would deter future interference in our elections by imposing automatic, severe economic sanctions on any country caught doing so. Both the Senate Banking Committee and the Senate Foreign Relations Committee are in the process of holding hearings on this and other proposals. Also right here at home, we learned last month from the FBI that a Russian oligarch with close ties to Vladimir Putin is a significant investor in a firm providing voter registration services for Maryland. I've asked the U.S. Treasury and the Department of Homeland Security to investigate what happened in Maryland and take all actions necessary to ensure the integrity of our elections. I'm also working on legislation to make sure this can't happen again - in our state or anywhere else. Our election infrastructure should never be owned or controlled by foreign adversaries. I will continue working to ensure that Maryland's - and our country's - elections systems are protected from attack.
### Fighting for Justice
The person who fills Justice Kennedy's position on the Supreme Court will have a pivotal role in making decisions that will affect every American for generations to come. Whoever has that position will impact countless issues in our country, including health care, a woman's right to choose, civil rights, voting rights, freedom of the press, environmental protections, workers' rights, and the undemocratic flood of secret money in elections. President Trump had an opportunity to pick a mainstream, consensus Supreme Court nominee who could garner broad bipartisan support. Instead, Brett Kavanaugh is a highly ideological and partisan choice. Both the selection process and his record indicate that he cannot be trusted to be a fair and impartial administrator of justice. President Trump established a litmus test for any Supreme Court nominee: they had to be willing to overturn key parts of the Affordable Care Act and a woman's right to reproductive choice. We know Judge Kavanaugh meets that test, or he wouldn't have been selected. Other parts of his record are also deeply troubling. We know Kavanaugh has an extreme view that invests presidents with excessive power and compromises our system of checks and balances. In short, if Kavanaugh were on the Supreme Court, he could be the deciding vote to protect President Trump from the consequences of his wrongdoing. That would be a travesty. What's more, we have only been given access to a fraction of the documents and information we have requested. Republicans have engaged in unprecedented obstruction, refusing to let the American people see the records from a period of time that Kavanaugh served in the White House and which, he has acknowledged, was important to the development of his thinking on key issues. The American people have a right to see these documents. What is the Trump Administration trying to hide? People in Maryland and across the country need and deserve a Supreme Court justice who will stand up for liberty and justice for all -- not someone pre-selected by right-wing groups who consistently sides with powerful special interests over the rights of workers, consumers, and individuals. Brett Kavanaugh simply does not meet that basic standard, and I will continue to fight his nomination to the Supreme Court.
### Promoting Small Business
Earlier this month, I had the opportunity to join Johns Hopkins University, Morgan State University, the Community College of Baltimore County, and Bloomberg for the Goldman Sachs 10,000 Small Business Program graduation in Baltimore. The program provides small business owners with practical business education, support services, and access to capital to help them build their businesses and create jobs. Among the 69 entrepreneurs that completed the program were bakers, artisans, engineers, contractors, dentists, and physical therapists. Before the graduation ceremony, I sat down with a number of the business owners. One of the people I spoke with was Robin Belle, the owner of Road Runner Specialty Group, which offers specialty in-home nursing services. Robin launched her business in 2012 when she couldn't find a nursing job. After this program, she's decided to launch a wellness-focused consultancy to help people learn to take better care of their health. I also spoke with LaQuicha Brown, who owns the small business Berries by Quicha and made delicious chocolate-covered strawberries for the event. It was an honor to participate in the roundtable discussion, deliver remarks at the graduation, and shake the hands of all of the graduates. I'm committed to continuing to work with small business leaders throughout Maryland to make sure they have access to the information, expertise, and credit they need to grow. Whether it's programs like this or investing in federal agencies like the Small Business Administration, the Economic Development Administration, and the Minority Business Development Agency, I will continue to support programs that can help entrepreneurs achieve their dreams. Our entire community benefits from their success.
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15512.11249668.4037691.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15512.11249668.4037691.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15512.11249668.4037691.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15512.11249668.4037691.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15512.11249668.4037691.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---

Republicans have engaged in unprecedented obstruction, refusing to let the American people see the records from a period of time that Kavanaugh served in the White House and which, he has acknowledged, was important to the development of his thinking on key issues. The American people have a right to see these documents. What is the Trump Administration trying to hide? People in Maryland and across the country need and deserve a Supreme Court justice who will stand up for liberty and justice for all -- not someone pre-selected by right-wing groups who consistently sides with powerful special interests over the rights of workers, consumers, and individuals. Brett Kavanaugh simply does not meet that basic standard, and I will continue to fight his nomination to the Supreme Court. Promoting Small Business Earlier this month, I had the opportunity to join Johns Hopkins University, Morgan State University, the Community College of Baltimore County, and Bloomberg for the Goldman Sachs 10,000 Small Business Program graduation in Baltimore. The program provides small business owners with practical business education, support services, and access to capital to help them build their businesses and create jobs. Among the 69 entrepreneurs that completed the program were bakers, artisans, engineers, contractors, dentists, and physical therapists. Before the graduation ceremony, I sat down with a number of the business owners. One of the people I spoke with was Robin Belle, the owner of Road Runner Specialty Group, which offers specialty in-home nursing services. Robin launched her business in 2012 when she couldn't find a nursing job. After this program, she's decided to launch a wellness-focused consultancy to help people learn to take better care of their health. I also spoke with LaQuicha Brown, who owns the small business Berries by Quicha and made delicious chocolate-covered strawberries for the event. It was an honor to participate in the roundtable discussion, deliver remarks at the graduation, and shake the hands of all of the graduates. I'm committed to continuing to work with small business leaders throughout Maryland to make sure they have access to the information, expertise, and credit they need to grow. Whether it's programs like this or investing in federal agencies like the Small Business Administration, the Economic Development Administration, and the Minority Business Development Agency, I will continue to support programs that can help entrepreneurs achieve their dreams. Our entire community benefits from their success. |

name: Jason Yates
subject: The one thing we must do
body:
Peter,
The death of Senator John McCain last week reminded me again of what is truly most important - our faith.
There was an outpouring of prayers and support for the McCain family but sadly there were also negative responses and disrespectful comments that failed to embody God’s love.
Senator McCain served our nation not only on the battlefield but also in elected office. While everyone might not agree with all of his political decisions and votes, he and his family deserve respect.
McCain’s life and death should remind us all that this earth is not our home (Hebrews 13:14). Death will come, but through Jesus Christ, we can accept God’s free gift of eternal life (John 3:16).
**The one thing we must be doing is praying for our elected leaders. We must pray for their hearts to be right with God, their families to be strengthened, and God’s wisdom to fill their minds.**
I want to challenge myself, and every follower of My Faith Votes, to take 5 minutes a day to pray for our elected officials by name.
We’ve created a [My Faith Votes Prayer Guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kaowy9aAKiKTtZMTE7lU74Emp41Dm5T06q1xK7UUBBPNTlPlOwd4S0-FlDUQm80BymxV8MPnXs48ycByhslhidEKBBIxJEa25hCKAyMJQhI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180830com01&n=1) to help you get started. Pray for the names in this guide and your Senators and Congressman or Congresswoman.
Print this guide off and add to it a list of additional representatives in your district.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kaowy9aAKiKTtZMTE7lU74Emp41Dm5T06q1xK7UUBBPNTlPlOwd4S0-FlDUQm80BymxV8MPnXs48ycByhslhidEKBBIxJEa25hCKAyMJQhI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180830com01&n=2)
There is nothing more powerful than humbling ourselves and seeking the Lord in prayer.
Together, let’s start a movement of faith in action, beginning on our knees in fervent prayer for our leaders and our nation.
I hope you will join me in this challenge to pray daily for our country and for the leaders making decisions on our behalf.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=sVjtaaM76uhcQh9rzPgTdK4k3HxH01oD63ZpN_IJlPNatv8_0oIrKklbMGLigco6&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180830com01&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180830com01&n=4).

name: Elise C.
subject: the rubber hits the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hello,
Amy's race is number one on the ballot in November. The primaries are over and it's time to get to work.
Now the rubber hits the road. We have just over two months left to share Amy's message, reach out to people all over the state, and get our voters to the polls.
As Finance Director, I know better than most that all of this work takes resources. That's why our team has set a $50,000 end-of-month goal -- so we can execute our campaign strategy and deliver a big win on November 6th.
This team appreciates everything you've done for this campaign, and for Minnesota. But with less than two days left until the deadline, I have to ask again: **Will you contribute to make sure Amy can stay in the Senate?**

name: Ben Jealous
subject: "Too extreme"? About that...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Turns out, "pie-in-the-sky" is pretty popular.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bde8/7ab0e2c4/7fd36a3e/349b428d/3999222845/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08308A") Friend, Republicans across the country -- including my opponent -- have called Medicare-for-All plans "too extreme." Well, about that: A recent Reuters/Ipsos poll found that Medicare-for-All is not only popular among Democrats, but Republicans too. A whopping 52% of Republicans supported it, as did 85% of Democrats. That's because regardless of whether they are conservative or liberal, everyone agrees that affordable, quality health care is a human right. And more and more voters believe that this is the best way to get it -- and I agree. That's why I want to bring Medicare-for-All to Maryland. [**This is a winning message, and voters need to hear it: Donate $5 or more before tomorrow's midnight deadline to help raise $25,000 to get our message out to voters now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bde8/7ab0e2c4/7fd36a3e/349b428d/3999222845/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08308A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bde8/7ab0e2c4/7fd36a3e/349b428c/3999222845/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08308A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bde8/7ab0e2c4/7fd36a3e/349b428f/3999222845/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08308A&amount=25&express_lane=true")
---

---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bde8/7ab0e2c4/7fd36a3e/349b4289/3999222845/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08308A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bde8/7ab0e2c4/7fd36a3e/349b4288/3999222845/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08308A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bde8/7ab0e2c4/7fd36a3e/349b428b/3999222845/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08308A&express_lane=true")
---
Maryland working families are feeling the pinch of rising premiums -- because under Larry Hogan, the average benchmark marketplace premium has exploded from $220 to $487 per month for a single person -- that's a more than 120% increase.
When asked about his plan to lower health care costs, Governor Hogan didn't have much to say: "Look, we would certainly like to if we can come up with any ideas."
I have one: Medicare-for-All. It's popular with Democrats and Republicans, and it will work. Bold, courageous leadership is what Maryland needs -- which is why I won't accept any less.
I have big ideas, sure, but they're big ideas that will work -- and voters agree. I've always said I'm not running to the left or to the right, but to the people. That's what my Medicare-for-All plan is all about.
[**This is a winning message, but we need the funds to get it out to voters now: We need to raise $25,000 by midnight tomorrow. Will you donate $5 or more to help us reach our huge end-of-month goal?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bde8/7ab0e2c4/7fd36a3e/349b428d/3999222845/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08308A")
Thanks,
Ben

name: Bob Menendez
subject: Friend, by now you've heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

By now you've probably heard about how my opponent, Bob Hugin, stands with Donald Trump and pharmaceutical companies that make billions ripping off patients and taxpayers.

But stop and think for a second about what a guy like that would do in the U.S. Senate. He certainly wouldn't fight for regular New Jerseyans.

[**Bob Hugin has never been on our side, and he never will be. Chip in $3 or more right now to help me win this election so I can keep fighting for you and your family in Washington.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb0/3af3c5d/3a73e332/4ec3c7ea/2726195614/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3187&refcode=em18_180830_8EOM4_fnd_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_8EOM4_fnd_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Bob+Hugin+has+never+been+on+our+side+and")

I've never forgotten my roots in Union City, where I grew up with immigrant parents who worked hard to give me and my siblings a shot at the American dream.

So, I'll always fight for the things that make opportunity possible for working families: affordable health care, a strong public education system, safe communities that are free from gun violence, and jobs that pay good wages.

That's how working folks do things here in New Jersey. We lift each other up.

[**If I 'm going to overcome massive spending by Bob Hugin and Donald Trump's allies and win re-election in November, I need you with me. Chip in $3 or more before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow night.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb0/3af3c5d/3a73e332/4ec3c7ed/2726195614/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3187&refcode=em18_180830_8EOM4_fnd_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_8EOM4_fnd_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+If+Irsquom+going+to+overcome+massive+spe")

Thank you,

Bob

**[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb0/3af3c5d/3a73e332/4ec3c7ec/2726195614/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3187&refcode=em18_180830_8EOM4_fnd_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_8EOM4_fnd_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Donate")**

name: Grassroots Team via Thompson HQ
subject: couldn’t have said it any better
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter, we couldn't have said it any better. We must harness this incredible outpouring of grassroots energy and activism to propel the blue wave to victory in November.

[**We 're working around the clock to support Democrats up and down the ballot. Become a member of our grassroots team by midnight on Friday with a donation of any amount!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/S453wM0MaAY_IheEPfYMdO7sfC2SdraXo9DWYxfPZrg=/kBZ8sjKID4NFz_R9S9gU73SIlcoD4RZXpHRSrALrDjI=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180830_1_2&amount=25.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)

name: Steve Schultz
subject: My wife's priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Debbie has worked tirelessly to protect health care for millions of Americans. She has worked to find solutions to save our economy and boost small businesses. She has fought tirelessly to protect the
|
---
| | Debbie has worked tirelessly to protect health care for millions of Americans. She has worked to find solutions to save our economy and boost small businesses. She has fought tirelessly to protect the middle class. [**Will you donate to Debbie 's campaign and help Democrats regain the majority and win here at home?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f52/622b7b5b/1c847bdc/307b9172/1796966772/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180830?refcode=dwse180830_m&recurring=true&amount=5") A Democratic majority is critical. While the Republicans have had the majority, they passed a tax bill which is basically a scam to hand billionaires tax breaks while doing nothing for middle class families. They've voted over and over to strip Americans of affordable insurance. It is clear which party prioritizes families. [**Answer this call and click here to make a contribution today.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f52/622b7b5b/1c847bdc/307b9172/1796966772/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180830?refcode=dwse180830_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Republicans can talk (and attack) all they want. But Debbie and Democrats have proven, through action, that they put families before all else. Not only do we need to help Debbie win, we also need to help Democrats take back the majority. [**Debbie set a goal to raise $10,000 in the next 24 hours. Don 't delay -- help us out by rushing in a contribution >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f52/622b7b5b/1c847bdc/307b9172/1796966772/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180830?refcode=dwse180830_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Debbie knows she can count on me. I hope she can count on you, as well. Steve Schultz
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

Peter,

When we launched our ambitious End-of-Month goal on Monday, we weren't sure if it would be achievable.

But this community stepped up and now we're so close to hitting it -- we've already raised $237,655!

This August goal is really important. We have five more critical primaries in the first two weeks of September and we need to help our remaining women make it over this last hurdle before turning our focus to November.

**Help us reach our $300,000 End-of-Month goal by donating $3 before midnight tomorrow and help pro-choice Democratic women win:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Our-August-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4b0c/24c69fd9/2514880c5/1886ce3a/2526869173/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180827_email_AugEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOurAugustGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFET89N_digital_email_20180830_EOMAugGoalKick_inact&source=WQEFET89N_digital_email_20180830_EOMAugGoalKick_inact")**

Thanks,

the EMILY's List team

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: reaching out for your help, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Hi again, Peter. As of today, we're exactly two weeks away from Primary Day. That means this is crunch time for our team. We need to kick it into overdrive.
So I'm reaching out to a group of Zephyr supporters, including you, ahead of tomorrow's official fundraising deadline to see if we can get your help.
Can you make your first online donation to our campaign? Zephyr's not taking any corporate money, so it's up to people like us to step up and fund this campaign. Here's the link:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/deadline](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780928/6e822e2f/1aaffb6d/4173a954/3141033355/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MzAtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180830-1-full")**
The next two weeks are going to be intense, but right now, we have the momentum. If we each step up to do our part, then we will hit our deadline goal, and that will put us one step closer to winning this thing.
Thanks for being part of this team. We couldn't do this without you.
\- Dan Torres
Campaign Manager, Zephyr for NY

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780928/6e822e2f/1aaffb6d/4173a955/3141033355/VEsE/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780928/6e822e2f/1aaffb6d/4173a956/3141033355/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

body:
**Gen. Stanley McChrystal Will Headline RK Dinner Oct. 13**
_McChrystal’s strategies helped Navy Seals kill Bin Laden_

**CHARLESTON, WV —** Today, the West Virginia Democratic Party announced that retired Army Gen. Stanley A. McChrystal will headline the 2018 Roosevelt-Kennedy Dinner. This year’s event will honor West Virginia’s Veterans.
**McChrystal** is a retired four-star general and the former commander of US and International Security Assistance Forces (ISAF) Afghanistan. In addition, he commanded of the nation’s premier military counter-terrorism force, Joint Special Operations Command (JSOC).****
General McChrystal’s ** ** work played a major role in the Navy Seal mission to kill Osama Bin Laden.
He developed and implemented a comprehensive counterinsurgency strategy in Afghanistan, and created a counter-terrorism organization that changed the interagency operating culture. McChrystal is a graduate of the United States Military Academy at West Point and the Naval War College.

**“** This year’s dinner is a salute to our Veterans and military families, and we are excited to have General McChrystal visit West Virginia to honor the sacrifices of the men and women in uniform,” said Belinda Biafore, chair of the West Virginia Democratic Party. “General McChrystal knows about the importance of teamwork and putting the country first, and in these divided times we must look to genuine heroes like McChrystal and his fellow Veterans. Because his work, the Navy Seals brought Osama Bin Laden to justice.**”**
**[To purchase tickets to the event click here& find the information below](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2050760/10664107/-749810905?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGEwYmJlYS04Y2FjLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJNMrDd5p0Y1YczRSjrykkt1GRJMlU-G7gs0CDIZTFY=).**

President Trump, Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, Senator Gardner, and many others messaged you on our behalf because we need your help to reach our August fundraising goal and keep up with the Democrats’ rapid fundraising pace.

Democrats have built up a sizable fundraising lead, and they are using their substantial resources to launch an all-out assault against Republicans. name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: $4.3 million (Cruz) vs. $0 (Beto)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The Texas Tribune compiled new fundraising numbers that show Ted Cruz has
raised $4.3 million from PACs -- even more than we expected. According to
the report, Cruz is actually using THREE separate accounts:

* Ted Cruz for Senate, a re-election campaign committee
* The Jobs, Freedom and Security PAC, a PAC
* The Ted Cruz Victory Committee, a fundraising PAC that sends
contributions to his re-election campaign and his other PAC

The Tribune put it bluntly: “Cruz and O’Rourke are taking very different
paths in fundraising for the race.” And we’re even more nervous now that
we know a pro-Cruz super PAC is planning to spend SEVEN FIGURES against
Beto.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6414?refcode=em20180830&t=1019&akid=5994%2E444211%2EIG23oC ]We have to fight back against the $4.3 million Cruz has raised from
PACs. Pitch in a donation of
$3
to help Beto reach his end-of-month goal by midnight tomorrow.

Your support has allowed us to run this race the right way, visiting every
single one of the 254 counties in Texas. It has allowed us to spend the
last 33 days on the road listening to Texans everywhere. And it has made
us more than a match for the special interests.

But Cruz’s PACs are heating up. Now is not the time for us to slow down.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6414?refcode=em20180830&t=1020&akid=5994%2E444211%2EIG23oC ]We can’t let special interests and corporations try to buy this Senate
seat. Can I count on you to give an urgent gift to keep us close in the
polls and continue to outwork Cruz's PACs?

Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6414?refcode=em20180830&t=1021&akid=5994%2E444211%2EIG23oC ]Contribute
$3

name: Jake Fons
subject: bracing ourselves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Mike Pence is collecting checks in the thousands today.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4acb9/c1f7015/6dd639e0/1141f081/634485619/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180830_em&recurring=auto") Friend, Just after the Cook Political Report moved our race toward Republicans, Vice President Mike Pence flew into Minnesota _**today**_ to fundraise with millionaires and big GOP donors. The White House has made this race one of their top targets, and we're bracing for a wave of special interest money in September. We've already seen one pro-Trump dark money group hit the airwaves with vicious attack ads against Tina. **Every poll shows this race tightening and within single digits. We must hit our August goal to fend off the special interests and super PACs ready to spend big in this race.[Can you make a contribution of $10 now before our deadline at midnight tomorrow?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4acb9/c1f7015/6dd639e0/1141f081/634485619/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180830_em&recurring=auto")** **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4acb9/c1f7015/6dd639e0/1141f081/634485619/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180830_em&recurring=auto")** We're trying to build a team of hundreds and thousands of people who give $10 or whatever they are able. Each of these contributions of $10 adds up to a campaign that can defeat anyone. **This is the power of grassroots fundraising, and what you do now is a big part of that.[Please, if you can, make a contribution now before our deadline at midnight tomorrow.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4acb9/c1f7015/6dd639e0/1141f081/634485619/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180830_em&recurring=auto")** Counting on you, Jake Fons

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Well, the attacks have started and now you have to make sense of it all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Look, I’d rather be talking about ideas: how to fix health care, how to deal with our debt, and how to stop the opioid epidemic. Peter -- Well, the attacks have started and now you have to make sense of it all. Yesterday, we learned that a dark money group launched a $2 million misinformation campaign against me and my record. **Look, I’d rather be talking about ideas: how to fix health care, how to deal with our debt, and how to stop the opioid epidemic.** While the Washington establishment might want to dominate this race with hyper-partisan bickering, I want to talk about how to help Tennesseans, and I’m going to keep on doing just that. **But our campaign needs to have the resources required to cut through the partisan noise and keep this campaign focused on Tennessee — can I count on you to pitch in $10 or whatever you can so we can put that message in front of voters?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2052131/10670070/-1142930280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmFmNmMyMS05M2FjLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X65zHSmiDT38o_02hDU9mlQZSIswt4Tv7-4PvVLTYpg=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180830-kochs-3-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: The reviews for President Trump’s U.S.-Mexico trade deal are in
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 30, 2018
## The reviews for President Trump’s U.S.-Mexico trade deal are in
##
##
**The success of President Donald J. Trump’s preliminary trade deal** with Mexico is clear from the broad support it’s attracted. Following this week’s announcement, the U.S. stock market reached record highs, while everyone from business leaders to labor unions praised the agreement’s stronger terms for American products and American workers. **The S &P 500 and NASDAQ** climbed to all-time highs following Monday’s announcement. And it wasn’t just the U.S. stock market that responded positively: Global markets took off as well. According to Reuters, “a global stocks index advanced to more than five-month highs on Tuesday,” clearly buoyed by investor optimism. “Indexes across Europe and Asia followed Wall Street’s lead, inching to multi-month highs.” **As promised by President Trump** , American workers stand to gain by renegotiating trade deals on the world stage. Christian Science Monitor had this to say about delivering on that promise: “A new United States-Mexico deal could end up doing something novel for an international trade agreement: putting concerns of workers near the center of the accord. **[The support for President Trump’s NAFTA renegotiation runs broad and deep.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0Mjk3ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI5Nzg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwMzI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/support-president-donald-j-trump-renegotiating-nafta/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **
## A historic moment: Presidential descendants visit the White House
##
**This week, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump** hosted the first-ever White House Historical Association’s “Presidential Sites Summit.” Leaders from more than 100 Presidential sites across the country were in Washington, D.C., to honor our national traditions. **To keep history alive** , Presidential descendants gathered for the summit and shared personal stories. The families of past Presidents serve a vital role in reconnecting with our country’s rich heritage. In [**_The Daily Caller_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0Mjk3ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI5Nzg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwMzI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://dailycaller.com/2018/08/30/melania-glimpse-wh-reception/) , Katie Jerkovich wrote that “the summit brought more than 40 presidential descendants of former Presidents of the United States — all the way back to James Monroe — together for the first time ever.” **“Congratulations to @WhiteHouseHstry** on a successful #PresidentialSites Summit. It was great hosting you at the @WhiteHouse,” the First Lady tweeted. **[See highlights from the White House Historical Summit reception.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0Mjk3ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI5Nzg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwMzI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://twitter.com/FLOTUS/status/1035202337952821249)**
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump host the White House Historical Association Reception** | August 29, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0Mjk3ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI5Nzg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwMzI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0Mjk3ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI5Nzg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwMzI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMwLjk0Mjk3ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMC45NDI5Nzg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwMzI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Justin Jones
subject: our third TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Our latest ad, "Too Partisan," which is up and running on TV across the district today. It's about Abigail's pledge to put families in the 7th district first -- before any political party -- when she serves us in Congress.
| | Peter, Washington is broken. Our country is divided. **And too few of our leaders in Congress -- including Rep. Dave Brat -- are willing to put party aside to fix it.** That's the message of [**our latest ad,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CCokAvlYOQBTl47xuD4FEgsE1U0UD3I01-JoucDWfbI=/Q44aKiSws72kY_O33OUeqR2S4tVIbsFXcfoubdxqZGg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) "Too Partisan," which is up and running on TV across the district today. It's about Abigail's pledge to put families in the 7th district first -- before any political party -- when she serves us in Congress. [_**Peter, take a minute to watch the video below, and then make a donation so we can reach our end-of-month fundraising goal tomorrow (and keep this ad running!):**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/CCokAvlYOQBTl47xuD4FEgsE1U0UD3I01-JoucDWfbI=/Q44aKiSws72kY_O33OUeqR2S4tVIbsFXcfoubdxqZGg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CCokAvlYOQBTl47xuD4FEgsE1U0UD3I01-JoucDWfbI=/Q44aKiSws72kY_O33OUeqR2S4tVIbsFXcfoubdxqZGg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Our team is very proud of this spot, Peter, because it highlights how, for Abigail, this pledge is personal. When she served as an officer in the CIA, she served under both Democrats and Republicans. Country, not party, came first. Changing Washington won't be easy, but as Abigail says in the ad, it will only happen if we elect new leaders who are committed to putting country first. Abigail is one such leader, and with this new ad -- our third of the general election -- we will share her message of positive change with every voter in our district. [**Peter, take a minute to watch the ad --_and then make a grassroots donation to Team Spanberger ahead of our big fundraising deadline tomorrow._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CCokAvlYOQBTl47xuD4FEgsE1U0UD3I01-JoucDWfbI=/Q44aKiSws72kY_O33OUeqR2S4tVIbsFXcfoubdxqZGg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Together, [**with your grassroots support,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CCokAvlYOQBTl47xuD4FEgsE1U0UD3I01-JoucDWfbI=/Q44aKiSws72kY_O33OUeqR2S4tVIbsFXcfoubdxqZGg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) we will reach our goal tomorrow, and then we will send Abigail and her commitment to working across the aisle to Congress. Thank you, Justin Jones _Communications Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CCokAvlYOQBTl47xuD4FEgsE1U0UD3I01-JoucDWfbI=/Q44aKiSws72kY_O33OUeqR2S4tVIbsFXcfoubdxqZGg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CCokAvlYOQBTl47xuD4FEgsE1U0UD3I01-JoucDWfbI=/zUnIKY4XE5kyivabuAWmcuCDqxNzy1C3mA8QDQ9xJdI=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/CCokAvlYOQBTl47xuD4FEgsE1U0UD3I01-JoucDWfbI=/oMdE6dU-Y8iBzqSF736DcEMVQ_DJBSIo51Cum5c2yyQ=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Poll - Motivating Millennials
body:
** NBC Poll of Millenials
------------------------------------------------------------

** "The candidate quality that matters most to millennials' vote in the upcoming midterms is someone who can bring about needed change."
------------------------------------------------------------
This is an important lesson to learn from these polls. We need to be bold in demanding real change. People are struggling to pay for their medical bills, their college tuition, and their homes. Young people need to know that someone will fight for them and that is exactly what I intend to do.

Here is the problem, only 29% of millennials think that it is more important to vote this year, and only 55% of millennials are planning on voting this year. We need to get those numbers up, and we need to do that by sharing our message as far and wide as we can. Our campaign is hard at work letting everyone know that we are here to fight for them, but we need your help.

One of the best ways to reach out to younger voters is with text messages, and while it is cheaper than direct mail, it can get a bit pricey. Our campaign will need to raise an additional $24,351 in order to reach all of the voters we need to win this year. This is good news though because with your help I am certain that we can reach that number.

Donate Today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=motivatingmillenials&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=880ce0c456-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_30_05_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-880ce0c456-9291445)
For more information on this poll click here (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/politics-news/poll-millennials-disillusioned-about-midterm-elections-n904436?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=880ce0c456-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_30_05_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-880ce0c456-9291445)

Our campaign will need to raise an additional $24,351 in order to reach all of the voters we need to win this year. This is good news though because with your help I am certain that we can reach that number. Donate Today () For more information on this poll click here () ============================================================ () () () () Copyright © 2018 Ian Todd for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Seven… Out of 100!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
_Sioux City Labor Day Picnic 2017_
Peter,
I’m looking forward to Labor Day weekend. Made a federal holiday in 1894, Labor Day honors the contributions that workers have made to the strength, prosperity, laws, and well-being of this country. It’s also a time to recognize the accomplishments that unions have played in building up the working class in America.
I strongly support unions, which is part of the reason our campaign has been endorsed by **15 different labor groups.** [**_Say you stand with me in supporting American workers by making a contribution to our movement today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2052747/10673427/-1178127994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzdjNGQ5Mi1hMGFjLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Clm2v2p84RFkOyTvEsmekEt9aq4ZktOKsohjw7OmiYo=)
The other reason labor groups are eager to support our campaign is that our opponent, Steve King, has been one of the worst members of Congress when it comes to supporting workers rights, and holds a **lifetime congressional score by the AFL-CIO of seven... out of 100! **
King has regularly introduced anti-union bills into Congress—thankfully, he’s received little support from his colleagues. In February, 2017 King re-introduced a so-called “right-to-work” bill that would significantly hamper unions across the country, and would likely lower wages for all Americans.
There is a strong correlation between union membership and incomes for the country’s working class. Declining unionization is also closely connected to both income inequality and lack of health care.
In Congress, I would be a strong voice for labor unions and the working class. One of the best ways you can show support for workers in advance of Labor Day weekend is to help send people to Congress that will side with workers over corporate greed. **I’m asking for your support so that I can be a voice for you.** [**_Please consider a contribution to our campaign today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2052748/10673428/-1178127994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzdjNGQ5Mi1hMGFjLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Clm2v2p84RFkOyTvEsmekEt9aq4ZktOKsohjw7OmiYo=)
Thank you for your continued support.
Standing Tall for All and in Solidarity,
J.D. Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2052749/10673429/-1178127994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzdjNGQ5Mi1hMGFjLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Clm2v2p84RFkOyTvEsmekEt9aq4ZktOKsohjw7OmiYo=)

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: make it count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Now, we're coming up on the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Tammy Baldwin.

Friend,

This has been quite a month. First, despite everyone who said we couldn’t do it, we won the GOP nomination for U.S. Senate. Then, we became Tammy Baldwin's number one target.

Now, we're coming up on the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Tammy Baldwin.

And everyone will be watching.

That’s why it’s more important than ever that we make this one count. But Friend, we’re still $12,922 away from our goal. [**Can you chip in today to help us make it?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW3UNOh9_5HJORSKrB55uXfB58p4_lYQWjQLRmSko-X8FYIB87s3iZphQLvb30QyOSytxTutHOY2Eo30Tjdn72VSEL_9Yf1tshHrU6ePOu3ZSioZ3svhpQ39zj3GU4icVUDdQ3QX54o4KJMo3giv_ZytnyOoeJAma7eDvA4ICBqfnfM3j0msuUl3mIL1TXu8TTaG8XzirC0zlTayA0kjXPNGzI4Ff9__BcLOmWh40M_Ie-22ufSK6UbvL2uw0wYCfOfphn0l0g2FoSAWKfSQsJRt2INzjLEeJJ-kigjSg7fiog5Pbs9FMpbOY3u1-6nC2K9jqEri7oT7HteT_8wE1EIMAgcheYleP-LeN8UmiO3abY7QGiIu3IYO0bIJy_vDrLc2CTgG0jsBToPOfOb-XZCo%3D)
[CHIP IN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW3UNOh9_5HJORSKrB55uXfB58p4_lYQWjQLRmSko-X8FYIB87s3iZphQLvb30QyOSytxTutHOY2Eo30Tjdn72VSEL_9Yf1tshHrU6ePOu3ZSioZ3svhpQ39zj3GU4icVUDdQ3QX54o4KJMo3giv_ZytnyOoeJAma7eDvA4ICBqfngIqehLcf8n8CYMbx16-UNb06ikBd-KBzCMhUWZ2soFWfomHenrC6Iehdn1pq-m3uyL2fkFvKBkbFZqDisMmNuaR5NaUakiuc8fEAo734wM4ivVaYvo6aZG9vixlrL9W-dmHLf4Jx7w6NaNECg-jBxV83H9Fzvh4bg--IPaW52W9Cb9Kc4Rhb-E7p9Y0vPNEyALAIAK8MxsQ943TAymX10oCa_d9b6Xn5wQdW2jJwI1Q%3D)
---

Friend, let's not forget how high the stakes are — if we don't do what it takes to win, Tammy Baldwin will get another six years of sitting on her hands and doing NOTHING for Wisconsin.

Let's face it – Tammy Baldwin fails to represent our Wisconsin values in so many ways.
* In her vote against Neil Gorsuch, and her plan to obstruct Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court.
* In how she voted against the tax cuts that are giving $1,600 in tax relief to middle-class families and voted to raise taxes on small businesses.
* In how she campaigns for socialized, government-run health care that will bankrupt us and destroy quality.
* In how she failed to help our veterans at the Tomah VA, and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to try and cover up the scandal.

I could go on and on — but I’ll tell you what — none of that is the Wisconsin Way. I know it, and you know it, too.

The results of this end-of-month effort will directly reflect how ready we are to take on Tammy Baldwin.

You can be certain that if we don’t hit our goal, Baldwin's campaign will be jumping for joy.

But I know we can raise enough and prove we’re ready to win it. We just need to work together now: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW3UNOh9_5HJORSKrB55uXfB58p4_lYQWjQLRmSko-X8FYIB87s3iZphQLvb30QyOSytxTutHOY2Eo30Tjdn72VSEL_9Yf1tshHrU6ePOu3ZSioZ3svhpQ39zj3GU4icVUDdQ3QX54o4KJMo3giv_ZytnyOoeJAma7eDvA4ICBqfn0jOiMu0DhC7j-ZjK1RKjLdPeRiSuDgoniI1nI1tHokbuuUZVvA7KM3sOnqMNloVOkixcrs9cxwrVTHfvnLMoBHYcfZaWoc0Z17wm7ktrne-Y20GiQce7ScqpIZrlYeMLCcaloBpEfhaFGVlAHjwRAqSB-VAWcCqtkMdIy1aYBaQlYAcBzBilrZo98FD9UEwXhcpNQbNCt8h3dBBYXnL0wC10Q5Bd2IB68FbjOkeUdW0%3D)**

Let’s show them how strong we are.

Thank you,

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW-9F8hJDHloH8roQzwIEWVWbNZUomxEtu__4816mqN3kdHDs6OUEIPQfiBM3tl81SyCPWSdn9mpN0FKx4fSH1Fx_V993lK-JE-VS5vAoS7WaiPV4iGGMA9O1sqpqHPA08G5bd65HHcgf_8czXyIGpLtUaG1KeRaSRXPEiMqUd0ITCGJuq3YHBc7hmKuaqnuIOvYrOnHJk5sD0msUrlezoemcUQ9Qmc93_coppy6VEbenSFikO5GXzeSUhdEmwVdJtg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW9jp2SOW2Pg5LyVrHFCdT7Re4pF-Cqp9AMT2I-yjU6_Z5zrhq6-NmHBFhyuLYUyhzrQeG93W6G1XmksbLbtqzwwlV2OET_DfAR8P9cbrognhB-b0C3EMBA2S7RsZ6FK_57XPElMgVstM1aih0XsPC9GuKtbmmebFYYCeU8KjNc1LO91CqtkEK6Ja8FPEIyiMpQsdkdFOqbr25vpokyxFSSMrfKP_4ZQTGeIv0cGjnIINwnQsgR79oTfNMSabQRxXxw%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=aNSe5QcYc8AiLUE9FQC9R4xx7sBm1ujx_ZfRyCUpWrsL53VPmjqS56jZXAge4q7XKuN-Nw6KFNfQ3k_md9-TFCMJLFBGvDfA3V9v23-_AClYe2GtDk6hb6Maadq7ZxWviY6Nq1Yh2Tn61sjOQxXVghFVy87iCYoReeFMnchuaHractVkjhFlruVOD2QqyjDpMiYbXJ6F2dWdHdmhHVxmzrHG4OWcVR5_Yr5YvO0zGt8k6HEI_fo1M7-Ox3ew9Py4). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW15_CQuPi-vrx2Thv1RJClpg0n7fAzU5EWtGMLeDtEUiEYaKDOGmg0nGs7Nd-Y34e-N53m1ncxRiooO30MVOLYibu1EawOOnvqZ-ad7cfa-ZFM04y-1mTANa1E8xKiuyC7kIXqkQog8HCkO-AM-jDNRKSUlJktVTVXNDNTqW1CECACaKTWq46kEntB3MbjeEYBywvZRnLGKvXwJBRRrRmGMMzdBhvkFZz6LV7KPsgp5dtwoIKng4TvAz8UZLSnl-KQxWYesgO2TMxIh5AHPwjEMIVfjoWRhw5QuI_xLYnVVdGNU3bqTk7D0p236WKWivwZvy-RL3J-THvcbqPyTx__T9LCx_8HW-0nJhL4xMX_CF) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW15_CQuPi-vrx2Thv1RJClp6_8tL1paaf1t3bJv1c5uM1S9yXF9dLaajZK6v8pAP-_UStpRZThFVmcE9VRlqq4W6t8RXIp1q4F5c808kVqSnGbH6jEqervXrR49H8olW1ZUw2vVfzgYVbRu3vnq7m9LC-thkvf1jQgljyjtRZTa6B2p7-kcqCpsMLkm9p7ZieQBWw8wn9kS92heV4gJEy585j7sQ1xM0qQSG9HiTXy8TvzKq9lmqqXDxzuBDqdHgQhb0IdkdVord_6h7TadEFfFlw4hUKE0H8nIqBt3CgvZrMJczUHHNb1ItTkavlEPOfNcStE9VpcSkKyUaUr-k2OUIWyVxuj4882NEqqOdF-NV) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW-9F8hJDHloH8roQzwIEWVWbNZUomxEtu__4816mqN3kNDdWLqLWpXrCubqxz6MOYMm63vzEV_KLC3pCNVxKMMWMFM7eVJbOkmSC3m20wamMQ4qzz9g-zV3qK7HAx264KMHPWnqVQXfmwmZJ-xXdbDEPeqFUVAEIvQ7-rTwlwoltxfQOGvbBxNp0DkpvYde6u3Fiij6-04K-zAFSkys4pCbL1O2DKoOK9ebthVTtsCjEWbVemdoWkc7wAbGkedbWPQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW9jp2SOW2Pg5LyVrHFCdT7Re4pF-Cqp9AMT2I-yjU6_ZlzH1ygYhH344l1i-ZNm38KIdm75P4oxcnnT05wgjMd8vsiWGNbLOgiBk68kPzNWWyJMgBbpst8O7NPBRsqhTDz1V5GLU6DtaVfyhU5sHl1mNe_gElvg5RXGInWADIg1XV8V2G_uB4RtuYlMoF6wgW89tsLuXbCG6x4fXaNcjkjFb02Pz9QkKakbH767l8D1B7mFf6Uf6t1Fl6OtlTr4V8A%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW9lHSjKn4v2XcZLyrWoqpS8-Ft11OEIK8u_Ym-VIYZC4fI2iU2rRQvytfRjPzloOvEOwm8n9sit_Jwsyzu9dpw5QzqMV4xMGliZtuOub-QOY4IyRM9yzvJAlZN7vkVLcFb6aLB60EUHYQezcnLzpKSXVvJkqxyPDDIeR0EWxZjjGIlvXXcvSDFiqJ2c9feUMnRGSNIAnJO66UjQzfP5YRh6kLXCWPyoXZKIoqw0ZZfC3TGxhkDM_uxUPRGG4KsyZFQ%3D%3D) feed. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=d5jPgCKrK6Pnh-9EvOQMW15_CQuPi-vrx2Thv1RJClojIwFYeU7dEMsRVuZAbANl95rpw9KDajOykgkAiBCVTvMn_Uxdrh6ONmO2JazL1yKs1lbY5f-GivD-_BG4HZenb7HvCHHwAHmhDINUp7rLqOiAnAAufw4t2FGHRTqDXL_JzmZI29VvaDPogfLClbQJ4Mir4IPBq-BuUJ4AmH9XO_-dCzElgx01S8SOjsjIk64mO96Y92NXuBcrZqyuWHBEkoBRWWO_XpRbOPY7wZ3dKqnMfoaaRk6zDFlX9081DQ12eSl1CyzqlXByc-KH4P_e2Udqm6s8cGiWkf8m7d1cc_fUi2W6cAt9ColoP0tW02vZdLHu2B-Ov05J-yr_AOTmoIYjVyLTLoiYmlqrbS21-Q%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=aNSe5QcYc8AiLUE9FQC9R4xx7sBm1ujx_ZfRyCUpWrsL53VPmjqS56jZXAge4q7XKuN-Nw6KFNfQ3k_md9-TFCMJLFBGvDfA3V9v23-_AClYe2GtDk6hb6Maadq7ZxWviY6Nq1Yh2Tn61sjOQxXVghFVy87iCYoReeFMnchuaHractVkjhFlruVOD2QqyjDpMiYbXJ6F2dWdHdmhHVxmzrHG4OWcVR5_Yr5YvO0zGt8k6HEI_fo1M7-Ox3ew9Py4) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2aa264d753684d0c9c2287a28e072bdc&_e=aNSe5QcYc8AiLUE9FQC9R4xx7sBm1ujx_ZfRyCUpWrsL53VPmjqS56jZXAge4q7XKuN-Nw6KFNfQ3k_md9-TFCMJLFBGvDfA3V9v23-_AClYe2GtDk6hb6Maadq7ZxWviY6Nq1Yh2Tn61sjOQxXVghFVy87iCYoReeFMnchuaHractVkjhFlruVOD2QqyjDpMiYbXJ6F2dWdHdmhHVxmzrHG4OWcVR5_Yr5YvO0zGt8k6HEI_fo1M7-Ox3ew9Py4) to unsubscribe. clean_body: Now, we're coming up on the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Tammy Baldwin. Friend, This has been quite a month. First, despite everyone who said we couldn’t do it, we won the GOP nomination for U.S. Senate. Then, we became Tammy Baldwin's number one target. Now, we're coming up on the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Tammy Baldwin. And everyone will be watching. That’s why it’s more important than ever that we make this one count. But Friend, we’re still $12,922 away from our goal. Friend, let's not forget how high the stakes are — if we don't do what it takes to win, Tammy Baldwin will get another six years of sitting on her hands and doing NOTHING for Wisconsin. Let's face it – Tammy Baldwin fails to represent our Wisconsin values in so many ways. In her vote against Neil Gorsuch, and her plan to obstruct Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court. In how she voted against the tax cuts that are giving $1,600 in tax relief to middle-class families and voted to raise taxes on small businesses. In how she campaigns for socialized, government-run health care that will bankrupt us and destroy quality. In how she failed to help our veterans at the Tomah VA, and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to try and cover up the scandal. I could go on and on — but I’ll tell you what — none of that is the Wisconsin Way. I know it, and you know it, too. The results of this end-of-month effort will directly reflect how ready we are to take on Tammy Baldwin. You can be certain that if we don’t hit our goal, Baldwin's campaign will be jumping for joy. But I know we can raise enough and prove we’re ready to win it. We just need to work together now: Let’s show them how strong we are. Thank you, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

body:
