Dear Friend,

I'm so proud of Steve Sisolak and this team. We're not backing down from Donald Trump, the Kochs, the special interests or anyone else Lackey Laxalt will shill for.

Despite the millions pouring in for our opponent, this race is a dead heat -- and there are less than 10 weeks left.

**[It's go time, team. Election Day is right around the corner and we need you with us -- now, not just on November 6th. Please chip in $5 or more to help us tackle our ambitious end-of-month goal before the deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrceniOBiE1ZlcEkl76vwvyEnoskyXEDLJhi7zExS4M=/HXm724hqeUKDJlvZYE9-TZnkE_mdK8BZDRcP9O60zmk=?gpsid=37_57_3295&refcode=em18_180830_EOM7_L1_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_EOM7_L1_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

This team is working hard to get the truth out there about Steve, the only candidate in this race with a proven record of finding solutions that move Nevada forward.

We were so excited that we launched our first ads of the general election just a few days ago, thanks to the support of grassroots donors across Nevada. But if we want to keep our message on the air, we need your help.

**[But we need to keep those ads on TV if we're going to stand a chance against Laxalt's dark money. We can win if we meet our goals, so I'm asking you to contribute before our deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QrceniOBiE1ZlcEkl76vwvyEnoskyXEDLJhi7zExS4M=/HXm724hqeUKDJlvZYE9-TZnkE_mdK8BZDRcP9O60zmk=?gpsid=37_57_3295&refcode=em18_180830_EOM7_L2_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_EOM7_L2_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Chris

Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

name: Mary Ellen Smith, bobcasey.com
subject: this year is too important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6335/51dbcc2a/1e97f7eb/3a80a6a/828197221/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
This is quite a year, team. This election will determine our nation's priorities more so than ever, and there's so much at stake.

Under this administration, access to quality, affordable health care is under attack. Congressional Republicans have spent countless hours trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which would strip health care from millions of Americans. Now this administration is coming after protections for people with pre-existing conditions. Half of all Americans have a pre-existing condition, ranging from asthma and acne to cancer and multiple sclerosis, and the Trump administration wants to make it legal for insurance companies to discriminate against them. Bob is fighting back with everything he has, but there are only 68 days left in this campaign, so it's time to double-down.

**_[Pennsylvanians can't afford to lose Bob's voice in the Senate -- donate $5 or more to protect him today.](https://secure.bobcasey. Right now he's airing an ad showcasing his support for President Trump, and if elected to the Senate, he will continue to be a rubber stamp for the president's dangerous and divisive agenda.

**Bob needs to raise another $6,700 before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline, and he's counting on supporters like you to help him close the gap. clean_body: "" This is quite a year, team. This election will determine our nation's priorities more so than ever, and there's so much at stake. Under this administration, access to quality, affordable health care is under attack. Congressional Republicans have spent countless hours trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which would strip health care from millions of Americans. Now this administration is coming after protections for people with pre-existing conditions. Half of all Americans have a pre-existing condition, ranging from asthma and acne to cancer and multiple sclerosis, and the Trump administration wants to make it legal for insurance companies to discriminate against them. Bob is fighting back with everything he has, but there are only 68 days left in this campaign, so it's time to double-down. "" "" While Bob is protecting your health care, his opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, has made no secret about where his loyalty really lies. Right now he's airing an ad showcasing his support for President Trump, and if elected to the Senate, he will continue to be a rubber stamp for the president's dangerous and divisive agenda. Bob needs to raise another $6,700 before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline, and he's counting on supporters like you to help him close the gap. So please, if you can, make a donation to support this campaign today. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks, Mary Ellen Mary Ellen Smith Campaign Manager Bob Casey for Senate | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Climate Action via jayinslee.com
subject: Climate ALERT -- Action needed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Trump's plan to roll back the Clean Power Plan is a climate catastrophe.

| | **We need you to take action, friend.** President Trump's plan to roll back the Clean Power Plan is an utter climate catastrophe. And 4,997 patriots have signed our petition to oppose Trump's extreme coal agenda. We need you to join them, NOW: | [SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7814b/2f5ea88d/761002ef/2cbc5877/985490297/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-30_climate-3-eom_non-signers&source=ema_2018-08-30_climate-3-eom_non-signers&utm_campaign=climate-3-eom&utm_medium=ema")
---
In case you missed it, Trump is replacing Obama's Clean Power Plan with a sham that flies in the face of global efforts to fight climate change. And it will bring harm to our own communities: By their own count, **1,400 more people will die each year** as a result of their plans, and thousands more will suffer from asthma. Trump's putting big oil and coal ahead of the health of our kids and our future. And we can't stand for it!
This is a climate disaster, which is why we need you to act now before the end-of-month fundraising deadline. [**Let's make sure our voices are heard -- sign the petition now!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7814b/2f5ea88d/761002ef/2cbc5877/985490297/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-30_climate-3-eom_non-signers&source=ema_2018-08-30_climate-3-eom_non-signers&utm_campaign=climate-3-eom&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks,
Team Inslee

name: Edana Walker, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: full circle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I first voted for Stacey back in 1993 when we were students at Spelman College. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa986/34a064cc/d9fe179/70ecc93/3641915321/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends, The first time I voted for Stacey Abrams was in April of 1993. She was running for student government at Spelman College. 25 years later, I voted (early) for Stacey Abrams in Georgia's gubernatorial primary. Watching those returns come in on primary election night - reading the text "_Stacey Abrams,__Democratic_ _nominee for governor_ " onscreen for the very first time - it all came full circle for me. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa986/34a064cc/d9fe179/70ecc90/3641915321/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODMwMTgtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE083018-1-full-img")
_That's me in lilac (left) and Stacey (right) at Spelman, 1995_ I remembered all of the times I watched Stacey put others before herself, every instance when she led with integrity, with strength, and with heart - even in the face of doubt. And if you know one thing about Stacey Abrams, it's this: She doesn't get ready. Stacey stays ready. That's why I joined her campaign team to help Stacey Abrams bring her leadership and brilliance to the highest office in Georgia. A lot has changed since our Spelman days (just look at our hair!), but Stacey is running the same kind of campaign today as she did back then. She's reaching out to _everyone_ , inviting everyone to the table to make sure every voice is heard. Because she knows Georgia's future will only be bright if it includes _all_ of us. **But in order to get there, it 's going to take ALL OF US stepping up to help. So I'm asking:** **[Make a $3 donation before our fundraising deadline this Friday at midnight. Hitting our fundraising goals is what will allow us to reach out to every Georgian, win in November, and make Stacey's positive vision - and this Spelman woman's dream - Georgia's reality.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa986/34a064cc/d9fe179/70ecc91/3641915321/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODMwMTgtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE083018-1-full-link1")** When I met Stacey during sophomore year, she was already the smartest person I'd ever met. And the fact that her values have not changed one iota since that day is a testament to who she is. That's how I know she will be our next governor. **We can get there if all of us stand together - but we need to pull out all the stops in these last 68 days. Donate today to help fund our massive voter outreach push to give every Georgian a reason to vote:** **[https://secure.staceyabrams.com/AugustDeadline](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa986/34a064cc/d9fe179/70ecc9e/3641915321/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODMwMTgtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE083018-1-full-link2")** Stacey Abrams is ready to lead as governor - and I'm ready to put in the hard work to get her there. Yours in the fight, \- Edana Walker
Deputy Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa986/34a064cc/d9fe179/70ecc9f/3641915321/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODMwMTgtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE083018-1-full-button")**

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa986/34a064cc/d9fe179/70ecc9c/3641915321/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa986/34a064cc/d9fe179/70ecc9d/3641915321/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa986/34a064cc/d9fe179/70ecc9a/3641915321/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I wouldn't consider it a win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
If this happens on Election Night, well Derek, it just wouldn't be good enough. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I'm about to ask you to support my campaign again. But first, let me tell you why.

On election night, even if I were to win by a big margin - but we didn't flip a single Congressional district from red to blue here in Virginia... _well, that just wouldn 't be good enough_. **But if I get re-elected by just _one_ point, and we take a whole handful of seats, helping Democrats win back the House and the Senate - now THAT's a win I could be proud of.**

We won't have the resources to support our great Congressional candidates if we don't hit our goal this month. [We still need more supporters to step up before tomorrow's deadline if we want a chance at making this goal and securing more resources. I sure would appreciate it if you could donate online today.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f117a/3e0906/6de79648/3e3693aa/1430086235/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?refcode=20180830_1_FR_TK_EOM-6-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+We+still+need+more+supporters+to+step+up&utm_campaign=20180830_1_FR_TK_EOM-6-LDND&source=20180830_1_FR_TK_EOM-6-LDND")

**Even $5 goes a long way. You can chip in whatever you feel comfortable with. I promise it helps a lot.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f117a/3e0906/6de79648/3e3693a8/1430086235/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180830_1_FR_TK_EOM-6-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180830_1_FR_TK_EOM-6-LDND&source=20180830_1_FR_TK_EOM-6-LDND")

But if I get re-elected by just one point, and we take a whole handful of seats, helping Democrats win back the House and the Senate - now THAT's a win I could be proud of. We won't have the resources to support our great Congressional candidates if we don't hit our goal this month. "" Even $5 goes a long way. You can chip in whatever you feel comfortable with. I promise it helps a lot. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" Appreciate your support, Tim "" * | "" "" ""

* * *

Peter --
Well, the attacks have started and now you have to make sense of it all. Yesterday, we learned that a dark money group launched a $2 million misinformation campaign against me and my record.
**Look, I’d rather be talking about ideas: how to fix health care, how to deal with our debt, and how to stop the opioid epidemic.**

name: Wendy H. [press secretary]
subject: The Administration is tripling down on MN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi --
Did you see the news today that Vice President Pence was campaigning in Minnesota _again_? In fact, it's the Administration's **third** visit to Minnesota since the end of June.
And earlier this week, Trump's super PAC announced they'll be spending over $3 million in Minnesota this fall.
It's no wonder CNN has called Minnesota "ground zero" in the 2018 elections.
**Now the question we face is simple: Are we going to let them "turn Minnesota red"?**
Our end-of-month deadline is in less than 2 days, and we're still short of our $50,000 goal. **Will you stand up by making a donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Hi -- Did you see the news today that Vice President Pence was campaigning in Minnesota again? In fact, it's the Administration's third visit to Minnesota since the end of June. And earlier this week, Trump's super PAC announced they'll be spending over $3 million in Minnesota this fall. It's no wonder CNN has called Minnesota "ground zero" in the 2018 elections. Now the question we face is simple: Are we going to let them "turn Minnesota red"? Our end-of-month deadline is in less than 2 days, and we're still short of our $50,000 goal. Will you stand up by making a donation today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** \-- Wendy

name: Ralph
subject: We need to do everything we can
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead
body:
Dear friends,
Just a few months ago, I shared with you my endorsement of Abigail Spanberger for Virginia's 7th Congressional District.
Since then, Abigail has continued to spend time in the community. Her team has knocked on thousands of doors, made thousands of phone calls, and engaged with thousands of voters. In every corner of the district, Abigail has shared the same policy-focused message: expand economic opportunity, increase healthcare access, and improve educational equity.
And these common-sense proposals are resonating.
They're resonating because Virginians are looking for thoughtful, committed individuals like Abigail who are willing to put people above politics and advocate for effective policies that support our families, our veterans, our students, and our workers.
But as we get closer to November, it is vitally important that we do everything we can to make sure Abigail's team has the resources they need to win. From her service to the nation in the CIA to her principled campaign for Congress, I know Abigail has what it takes to serve the people of the 7th District with distinction, integrity, and honor.
And you know it too. That is why I am asking you to contribute to Abigail's campaign to ensure a firm foundation leading into the final weeks of the race.
[Contribute](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f20bf/39260142/449874bf/62634f98/335271252/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoidHdhNGFzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGszMTctYnUtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/twa4as?refcode=jtk317-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Take care,
--Ralph
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from The Way Ahead email list, please [click here.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f20bf/39260142/449874bf/62634f9b/335271252/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.ralphnortham.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

subject: Trump+DeSantis launch disgusting attacks on Gillum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
President Trump and his nominee will say anything - lie, blow racist dog whistles and stir up hate - to keep Andrew Gillum from the governor's mansion.
#
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a94c/bed43eb/7906f847/75fc987a/960908485/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em180830")

Friends,
The headlines say it all. President Trump and his nominee will say anything - lie, blow racist dog whistles and stir up hate - to keep Andrew Gillum from the governor's mansion.
Friends, we can't let them win.
**Respond to these false and racist attacks - rush a donation to help Our Revolution elect Andrew Gillum today.**
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a94c/bed43eb/7906f847/75fc987a/960908485/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em180830")**
\----------Forwarded message----------
Friends,
**YOU MADE HISTORY!** Andrew Gillum just won a nailbiter, five-way race against candidates backed by corporate interests, to take on President Trump's endorsed nominee in November. Gillum's people-powered campaign is Florida's best shot in two decades to flip Florida blue.
[**This is against ALL the odds, and it's proof that _big organizing beats big money in politics._ That's what we need for November. Pitch in $5 to help Andrew Gillum's campaign and Our Revolution win this election.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a94c/bed43eb/7906f847/75fc987a/960908485/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em180830")
Florida has proved that this is no ordinary campaign. We have a true progressive on the ballot, the first black major party nominee for governor in state history, and he is counting on our support. That is why Senator Bernie Sanders, local groups, and Gillum's grassroots army got out the vote to put him over the top in this primary.
When Florida voters went to the polls tonight in record numbers, they didn't just vote for Andrew Gillum, they voted for Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, public education, criminal justice reform, the environment, and making Florida a state where everyone thrives. They voted for a political revolution--our revolution.
[**When people vote, we win. Pitch in $5 right now to help Our Revolution elect Andrew Gillum the next Governor of Florida.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a94c/bed43eb/7906f847/75fc987a/960908485/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em180830")
Let's keep making history.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
We did it and it's because of you. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/096d21fc1bc9/thank-you?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Friends,

Thank you for nominating me to be your Republican candidate for Congress once more. Our campaign received more votes – 81,000 as of this writing – than any other House candidate in the entire state of Arizona!

I could not do it without you and I appreciate this overwhelming vote of confidence. It shows that standing up for the Constitution, the rule of law, and our conservative values matters to voters in Arizona and I will never shy away from the fight.

Now, we look to November 6th– just 67 days away and the dishonest attacks of liberal Democrats like Nancy Pelosi. My opponent, a VA doctor who allowed our VA hospital to fail our veterans, resulting in tragic deaths, has already started. He did nothing while our veterans suffered and now he wants to go to Washington to impose his socialist views on the rest of us.

Help me kick his...big government habit. Any financial support you can provide will be very helpful. The average House campaign costs $1 million but I have just $200,000 in my campaign account. Will you help?

[Click here to make a contribution today](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=4fea473691&e=7ca82c1e3d) and help us finish what we’ve started. I am a proud supporter of President Trump and support his efforts to build the wall, restore balance to our trade relationships, and reshape our Supreme Court with a conservative majority who will defend the Constitution.

Again, thank you for your support and friendship. Onward to victory!
---
|
---
| Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District
---

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: We've fallen a little behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
This is a make-or-break moment.
#

Peter -
Our final fundraising deadline before the primary ends at midnight tomorrow, and right now, we've fallen a little behind where we need to be to reach our goal.
As we prepare for the final stretch of the primary, we need to make sure we have the resources to compete, and it's especially important that we hit our deadline goal to make sure we can fight back against my opponents' corporate money.
This is a make-or-break moment for our campaign. We have an enormous amount of momentum heading into these last two weeks. This race is going to be extremely close, so we cannot afford to fall short and lose steam.
That's why we need to close the gap and hit our goal, but we need to work together to do that. Can we count on you?
**[Make a $3 donation to our campaign before tomorrow's deadline. We cannot let our opponents buy this election with their corporate money. Together, we can beat them.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78092f/6e822e2f/1aa9ddfc/4173a808/2123085113/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MzAtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180830-2-full")**
Grassroots donations have brought us this far. We've gone from being a long shot to having a serious chance at winning this race. But we need to give it all we have right now. There's no time to rest or get complacent.
Thank you so much for being part of this grassroots movement. Your support means the world to me, truly.
All my best,
Zephyr Teachout
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78092f/6e822e2f/1aa9ddfc/4173a808/2123085113/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MzAtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180830-2-full")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY

1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. name: Frank Schultz, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: Can you believe this guy, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
You know friend, this latest ad from Bob Hugin proves something that we didn't even think was possible -- **Hugin is willing to go just as low as President Trump.**

The new Hugin campaign attack ad is loaded with hypocrisy and lies about healthcare costs -- even though he gouged cancer patients and increased drug prices to unaffordable levels.

It just goes to show that like Donald Trump, Bob Hugin is willing to do or say **ANYTHING** to mislead voters and win this seat.

[**This ad proves that we need to redouble our efforts right now to make sure New Jerseyans know the truth about greedy CEO Bob Hugin and his price-gouging ways. Chip in $3 or more right now and help us continue to tell the truth to voters across the state.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb7/3af3c5d/3a8b5b74/4ec3c53e/1491610421/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3268&refcode=em18_180830_HugAd_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_HugAd_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+This+ad+proves+that+we+need+to+redouble+")

[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb7/3af3c5d/3a8b5b74/4ec3c531/1491610421/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3268&refcode=em18_180830_HugAd_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_HugAd_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Donate")
While Bob Hugin was making millions of dollars forcing cancer patients to refinance their homes, sell their belongings and choose between life-saving drugs or putting food on their tables, Democratic Senator Bob Menendez was working with President Obama to pass the Affordable Care Act.

While Hugin's company Celgene was raising prices three times in one year on their cancer medication, Bob Menendez was fighting to protect health care coverage for millions of New Jerseyans.

And while Bob Hugin was blocking generic medicines that would have lowered health care costs for cancer patients, Senator Bob Menendez was writing laws that protect community health centers.

These blatant lies may be one of Trump's go-to strategies, but New Jersey voters see right through them. New Jersey can't trust or afford Bob Hugin and his greed.

[**Chip in $3 to Democratic Senator Bob Menendez right now and help us put an end to these lies and tell New Jersey voters the truth about what 's at stake in November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb7/3af3c5d/3a8b5b74/4ec3c530/1491610421/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3268&refcode=em18_180830_HugAd_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_HugAd_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+3+to+Democratic+Senator+Bob+Mene")

It's never mattered more.

Thank you,

Frank

Frank Schultz
Campaign Manager
Menendez for Senate

[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb7/3af3c5d/3a8b5b74/4ec3c533/1491610421/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3268&refcode=em18_180830_HugAd_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180830_HugAd_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+Donate")

Menendez for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@menendezfornj.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Menendez for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas.
